{{CargoRelic
|name=Joseph's Manuscript
|class_id=20365
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Joseph Murray is known as the father of organ transplantation. He is the first doctor in the world who successfully performed an organ transplantation operation and opened up a new path for modern medicine. The manuscript to which he devoted his whole life is a must-learn material for later generations!
|fame=14
|art=18
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=31
|ss1=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +1<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss2=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +2<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss3=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss4=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss7=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
